---
title: "SABER West 2024: Survey on Generative AI in Undergraduate Biology"
date: 2024-01-13
categories:
  - AI
  - Instructors
draft: true
---

I presented a survey instrument for gathering instructor and student perspectives on generative AI in undergraduate biology education at [SABER West 2024](https://sites.google.com/uci.edu/saber-west-2024/home).

The full poster, abstract, and embedded PDF are on the [Scholarship page](../../scholarship/papers/saberwestsurvey.qmd).
